chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-139 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 26.05.2025 Mr. Nadeem Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Rubeena Dhamrah, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. Mr. Abdul Waris Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ------ Through this petition, the petitioner has sought indulgence of this Court against the alleged harassment at the hands of S.H.O. P.S. Dilmurad. On notice, S.H.O. P.S. Dilmurad as well as S.S.P. Jacobabad have filed their replies and submitted that they will not cause any sort of harassment to the petitioner. Counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the statements, seeks disposal of instant petition. Order accordingly. Judge Manzoor
